generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LX : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RawLiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435i : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for depth perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthDataTransmitted
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor speed feedback"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuator for vehicle speed control"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuator for vehicle steering control"
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration and libraries"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-process communication and node management"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for rapid prototyping of DT components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance CPlusPlusForROS2 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for ROS2 node lifecycle management"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex systems modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance SQLDatabaseTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for vehicle state data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DBSCANPointCloudClustering : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN-based point cloud clustering algorithm"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, Python38
]

instance KalmanFilterObjectTracking : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, Python38
]

instance ACCControlLogic : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC control logic per ISO 15622"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CPlusPlusForROS2, MATLABSimulink
]

instance RawLiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LX
]

instance DepthDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435i
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VedderElectronicSpeedController
]

instance RawLiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawLiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANPointCloudClustering, ROS2Middleware, Python38
]

instance DepthData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth perception data from Intel Deepsense D435i"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterObjectTracking, ROS2Middleware, Python38
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed feedback data from Vedder Electronic Speed Controller"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlLogic, ROS2Middleware, Python38
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data Monitoring service for real-time visualization of vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateVisualization, ObjectTrackReports, PerformanceAnalytics
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation Offloading service for executing ACC system on DT to reduce on-board computation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ComputationOffloadingStatus
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote Management service for enabling/disabling ACC, setting desired speed, and emergency braking via UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance RealTimeVehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state and object tracks"
]

instance ObjectTrackReports : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Object track reports for detected entities"
]

instance PerformanceAnalytics : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance analytics for ACC system monitoring and troubleshooting"
]

instance ComputationOffloadingStatus : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status of ACC system offloading to digital twin"
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC system via remote management UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable ACC system via remote management UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed via remote management UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking via remote management UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TraxxasSlash4x4 : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Base Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium teleoperated vehicle"
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonNXAntenna : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX antenna component"
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer"
]

instance PhysicalVehicleSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical 1/10-scale autonomous vehicle system"
    base:contains TraxxasSlash4x4, NVIDIAJetsonNXAntenna, NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano, HokuyoUST10LX, IntelDeepsenseD435i, VedderElectronicSpeedController, MotorActuator, SteeringServoActuator
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Motor voltage commands for speed control and emergency braking commands sent to the vehicle's actuation system; steering angle commands are not part of the DT's output as per the documented ACC implementation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "End-to-end latency of at most 100 ms between vehicle and DT Entity, with clocks synchronized to 100 ms accuracy as per 3GPP Technical Specification 22.185 for safety-critical vehicular applications."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Distributed system with Physical Twin Entity on vehicle hardware (Jetson Orin Nano), Digital Twin Entity for computation offloading (cloud-based), User Entity (UI on separate device), and Cross-System Entity (Data Translation), communicating via ROS2 intra-component and Wi-Fi inter-entity."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Used during design phase for cyber-physical experimentation, validation of requirements compliance, and operational phase for optimization and health monitoring, as described in automotive DT surveys by Deng et al. and Schwarz and Wang."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-component communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication with 100 ms latency constraint; Data Translation component serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano on the vehicle; Digital Twin Entity and Data Storage on cloud; User Entity on separate device."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT structure; ISO 15622 for ACC control strategy implementation."
]
